message:
fix(web): improve mobile toggle indicator and prevent stuck scroll on load

SequenceView.tsx:
- Fix ViewModeToggle indicator position by reading actual computed padding
  from CSS styles instead of hardcoded value (handles mobile vs desktop)
- Fix "stuck scroll" bug on initial sequence load by checking visibleRange
  before attempting external scroll syncs - ensures renderer has processed
  the sequence before syncing scroll position from store
- Add visibleRange to useEffect dependency array for correct reactivity

CSS mobile improvements:
- components.css: Remove redundant padding rules
- mobile-overrides.css: Enhanced responsive padding for toggle containers
- mobile-ux.css: Additional mobile UX refinements for touch interactions

These fixes improve cross-device consistency and prevent a scroll position
bug that could lock the view on first load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
